description: Skips the current loop iteration, continues with the next one and returns the given value.
examples:
<sqf>
// results in [2, "TEST", 4]
private _result = [1, 2, 3] apply {
	if (_x == 2) then {
		continueWith "TEST";
	} else {
		_x + 1;
	};
};
</sqf>
name: continueWith

Item.desc: value to be returned when iteration is skipped
Item.name: return

Item.desc: Code to execute once the [[Script_Handle#Promise_Handles|Promise]] has completed. The code will be executed in [[Scheduler#Unscheduled_Environment|Unscheduled Environment]].
Item.name: code

Item.desc: Code to execute once the [[Script_Handle#Promise_Handles|Promise]] has completed. The code will be executed in [[Scheduler#Unscheduled_Environment|Unscheduled Environment]].
Item.name: code

Item.desc: Arguments passed into code in _thisArgs variable
Item.name: args
